steps.title: Set off the modifier
steps.content: The main subject is helical swimming, and the main verb is bestows. The phrase widely understood to confer stability and efficiency interrupts between them and is closed by the dash after ciliates, so it needs opening punctuation after swimming.

steps.title: Reject extra verbs
steps.content: A adds is, creating an extra finite verb. B also adds is and leaves the modifier unpunctuated. C adds has been, creating the same verb problem and missing the opening comma. The answer is D.
